'''sagawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobsonfly|dobsonfly]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobsonfly|dobsonfly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sagawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sægæwæth|sægæwæth]] || [[word:sægæwæj|sægæwæj]] || [[word:sægæwæsh|sægæwæsh]] || [[word:sægæwæ|sægæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sagagawath|sagagawath]] || [[word:sagagawaj|sagagawaj]] || [[word:sagagawash|sagagawash]] || [[word:sagagawa|sagagawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sagawath|sagawath]] || [[word:sagawaj|sagawaj]] || [[word:sagawash|sagawash]] || [[word:sagawa|sagawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sagafwath|sagafwath]] || [[word:sagafwaj|sagafwaj]] || [[word:sagafwash|sagafwash]] || [[word:sagafwaf|sagafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sagawatha|sagawatha]] || [[word:sagawaja|sagawaja]] || [[word:sagawasha|sagawasha]] || [[word:sagawaka|sagawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sagawath|sagawath]] || [[word:sagawaj|sagawaj]] || [[word:sagawash|sagawash]] || [[word:sagawa|sagawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sagawathal|sagawathal]] || [[word:sagawajal|sagawajal]] || [[word:sagawashal|sagawashal]] || [[word:sagawakal|sagawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sagawathatha|sagawathatha]] || [[word:sagawajaja|sagawajaja]] || [[word:sagawashasha|sagawashasha]] || [[word:sagawaka|sagawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sagawathan|sagawathan]] || [[word:sagawajan|sagawajan]] || [[word:sagawashan|sagawashan]] || [[word:sagawakan|sagawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sagawathaoro|sagawathaoro]] || [[word:sagawajaoro|sagawajaoro]] || [[word:sagawashaoro|sagawashaoro]] || [[word:sagawakaoro|sagawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
